timeline_beats: Introduction to lion's size and appearance
Overview of pride dynamics and roles
visual_objects: Close-up shots of lion mane and body

clip_structure.clip_1: Introduce the lion as a big animal with distinctive physical traits and size comparison to other animals.
clip_structure.clip_2: Show social behavior within prides and hunting strategies emphasizing their role as apex predators.
clip_structure.clip_3: Highlight conservation challenges and efforts to protect lions in the wild.
